ctaTitle: Ready to Cut the Landline or Upgrade Your Business Phones?
ctaText: Contact McKee Security today. We will assess your needs, recommend the right Yealink hardware, and provide a clear quote with no surprises. Call us at (705) 457-2156 or use the inquiry form below.
html:
Professional VoIP Phone Service

HOSTED & MANAGED BY MCKEE SECURITY

Whether you are replacing an aging landline at home or upgrading your business phone system, McKee Security provides fully hosted VoIP phone service with local support you can actually reach. We handle setup, configuration, provisioning, and number porting. You never have to deal with a call centre or troubleshoot on your own.

Hosted VoIP, Local Support

Every system is installed and tested by our team before it ever rings for the first time. Our technicians provision the hardware, test call quality, verify E911 registration, and walk you through the system before the job is complete. When something needs attention, you reach us directly, not a help desk somewhere across the country.

Reliable Home Phone Service, Without the Landline

Our residential VoIP service gives you everything you would expect from a traditional home phone. You get crystal-clear HD voice quality, voicemail, caller ID, call waiting, and unlimited local and long distance calling across Canada and North America. Everything is delivered over your existing internet connection. We install and configure the equipment, transfer your existing number if you would like to keep it, and remain your direct point of contact for ongoing support.

Unlimited NA Calling Voicemail & Caller ID Call Forwarding E911 Compliance Managed Number Porting Local McKee Support

Residential Yealink DECT Cordless Systems

We deploy Yealink DECT cordless phone systems for all residential installations. These are purpose-built VoIP handsets with HD audio, long range, and a clean modern design that fits naturally in any home. Multiple handsets register to a single W70B base station so any phone in the house can answer the same line.

Yealink W70B Base Yealink W78H Handsets HD Audio Long Range DECT Multi-Handset Support

Business Phone Systems Built for How You Work

For commercial clients, we design and deploy VoIP systems that handle the real demands of a business environment. That includes multiple lines, call routing, auto-attendant, voicemail-to-email, hold music, and more. All systems are hosted on our managed platform, provisioned by our team, and supported locally. We handle full number porting from your existing provider with zero downtime.

Auto-Attendant Voicemail to Email Multi-Line & DID Call Transfer & Hold Zero-Downtime Porting

Commercial Yealink Professional Desk Phones

We offer Yealink desk phones across three tiers to suit any business environment, from a single-line front counter to a multi-extension office. All models deliver HD voice quality, PoE support, and seamless provisioning through our hosted platform.

Yealink T53W Entry Level Phone

Clean standard business desk phone with colour display and physical keys. Reliable, straightforward, and cost-effective for common workspaces and front counters.

Yealink T57W Mid Tier Phone

7-inch adjustable colour display with a strong feature set and polished professional appearance. Ideal for managers and busy office staff.

Yealink T88V Executive Level Phone

Large colour touchscreen with Android 13, our primary commercial deployment phone for executive-level presence and advanced features.

Why McKee Security VoIP

Locally managed. Professionally installed. Personally supported.

We Configure Every Account

When you sign up for VoIP through McKee Security, you are not signing up for a self-serve platform. We configure every account, install every phone, and stay your direct point of contact for the life of your service.

Tested Before It Rings

Our technicians provision hardware, test call quality, verify E911 registration, and walk you through the system before the job is complete. Our hosted platform is managed on the back end by our carrier partner.

30+ Years in Haliburton

We have been supporting residential and commercial clients across the Haliburton region for over 30 years. VoIP is a natural extension of that relationship. It is one more way we keep your home or business connected.

Pricing on Inquiry

Every installation varies depending on the number of lines, hardware selected, number porting requirements, and system complexity. Contact us for a no-obligation quote tailored to your home or business.

Residential VoIP

Replace your landline with a Yealink DECT system installed and supported by our local team. Keep your number, get unlimited calling, and call us when you need help.

Commercial VoIP

From a single desk phone to a multi-extension office with auto-attendant and voicemail-to-email. We build the system around how you actually work.

Ready to Cut the Landline or Upgrade Your Business Phones?

Contact McKee Security today at (705) 457-2156 or email info@mckeesecurity.ca. We will assess your needs, recommend the right hardware, and provide a clear quote with no surprises.
